# Art Sources

- Kenney Scribble Platformer
  - Source: https://kenney.nl/assets/scribble-platformer
  - License: CC0 1.0 Universal
  - Use: UI buttons/panels, tiles, coins, chest, props, basic effects.

- Knight spritesheet by marqueeplier on OpenGameArt
  - Source: https://opengameart.org/content/knight-spritesheet
  - License: CC0
  - Use: player/boss/enemy prototype frame animation sprites.

- Dark Knight spritesheet by marqueeplier on OpenGameArt
  - Source: https://opengameart.org/content/knight-spritesheet
  - License: CC0
  - Use: enemy/boss prototype frame animation sprites.

- Pixel art sword slash sprites from OpenGameArt
  - Source file downloaded from OpenGameArt: pixel_art_sword_slash_sprites.png
  - Use: attack hit visual reference/effect texture.

All listed assets are selected for prototype use because their pages/files indicate CC0 or free reuse suitable for commercial and non-commercial projects. Keep this file with the project for license tracking.
